tasks.title: Add encryptedEnvVars to Agent type + buildAuthEnvPrefix() helper
tasks.notes: Added encryptedEnvVars?: Record<string, string> to Agent interface. Created src/utils/auth-env.ts with buildAuthEnvPrefix() supporting linux, macos (double-quoted), and windows (PowerShell single-quoted) escaping.

tasks.title: Update provisionApiKey() to store encrypted API key
tasks.notes: Added encryptPassword + updateAgent imports. After setEnv loop, stores encrypted key in agent.encryptedEnvVars via updateAgent(). Updated success message to mention 'stored in member config'.

tasks.title: Fix macOS setEnv/unsetEnv for .zshenv
tasks.notes: Added .zshenv to setEnv() (now 5 commands) and unsetEnv() (now 5 commands). .zshenv is sourced in non-interactive zsh sessions on macOS.

tasks.title: VERIFY 1
tasks.notes: All Phase 1 changes verified. platform.test.ts updated for new macOS command counts. 34/35 test files pass. auth-socket.test.ts has 15 pre-existing EADDRINUSE failures on Windows (named pipe held by another process) — not caused by Phase 1 changes.

tasks.title: Inject auth env vars in execute_prompt
tasks.notes: Imported buildAuthEnvPrefix. Prepended authPrefix to all 3 command builds (initial + stale session retry + server error retry). Clean compile.

tasks.title: Inject auth env vars in execute_command
tasks.notes: Imported buildAuthEnvPrefix. Prepended authPrefix to the regular (synchronous) command path only. Long-running nohup path is out of scope per risk register.

tasks.title: Add OOB API key entry to provision_auth
tasks.notes: CLI: --api-key flag changes prompt/success text. auth-socket: added collectOobApiKey() with --api-key terminal launch. provision-auth: non-Claude providers without api_key param now use OOB terminal prompt instead of error.

tasks.title: VERIFY 2
tasks.notes: All Phase 2 changes verified. 34/35 test files pass (535 passed, 3 skipped). auth-socket.test.ts has 15 pre-existing EADDRINUSE failures on Windows (named pipe held by another process) — same as V1, not caused by Phase 2 changes. tool-provider.test.ts updated for OOB API key flow.

tasks.title: Rename CLAUDE_PATH to CLI_PATH
tasks.notes: Renamed CLAUDE_PATH to CLI_PATH in linux.ts (6 refs) and windows.ts (5 refs). No functional change, clean compile.

tasks.title: Fix Gemini session resume
tasks.notes: parseResponse() returns 'gemini-latest' sentinel on success. resumeFlag() returns '--resume latest'. buildPromptCommand() updated to match.

tasks.title: Verify remove_member cleanup of stored env vars
tasks.notes: Verified: unsetEnv() cleans shell profiles (line 41), removeAgent() deletes entire record including encryptedEnvVars (registry.ts:120-127). No code changes needed.

tasks.title: VERIFY 3
tasks.notes: All Phase 3 changes verified. 34/35 test files pass (535 passed, 3 skipped). auth-socket.test.ts has 15 pre-existing EADDRINUSE failures on Windows — same as V1/V2, not caused by Phase 3 changes. Provider tests updated for Gemini resume changes.

tasks.title: Tests: platform fixes + auth env prefix helper
